citation: V E, S., Shin, C., & Cho, Y. (2021). Steel Industry Energy Consumption [Dataset]. UCI Machine Learning Repository. https://doi.org/10.24432/C52G8C.
timestamp_convention: The source preserves 96-row operational-day blocks ordered from 00:15 through 23:45, followed by a 00:00 row that represents the interval ending at the next calendar-day boundary. Raw row order is preserved; chronological validation uses an effective timestamp that adds one day only to NSM=0 rows.
